issues.description: scripts/gates/plugins/protect_branch.py:27 WRITE_TOOLS 仍不含 Bash，bash echo > reviews/*.json 仍可绕过；已显式登记 F-003 bash_write_protect 范围（F-r2-10 carry-over，approved 容许）
scripts/gates/run.py:436-440 F-09 traceback 抑制后 audit log 无 traceback 字段；F-003 待办（F-r2-11 carry-over）
scripts/gates/run.py:523-527 write_audit 'w' 模式 + 微秒文件名；当前部署拓扑不触发，F-003 future-proof（F-r2-07 carry-over）
scripts/gates/plugins/sourcing.py _resolve_targets / _has_artifact_md_change 各遍历一次 _changed_artifact_paths；规模小不紧迫（F-r2-09 carry-over）

suggestions: round-2 6 项 must_fix 全部实质闭环：F-r2-01 选 B 方案（修文案+模块 docstring，triggers 保持 [pre-commit]）；F-r2-02 数据源统一+_get_staged_files 失败转 FAIL+WARNING；F-r2-06 _has_reviews_diff returncode 检查保守返 True；F-r2-03 traceability.run 拆为 _check_features_file (41 行) + _check_design_traceability (47 行)，run 本体降至 15 行 CC≈4；F-r2-04/05 protect_branch 补 docstring + 提 import sys 到顶部

新增/调整测试：test_run_returns_fail_when_get_staged_files_returns_none / test_run_uses_ctx_changed_files_when_available / test_has_reviews_diff_returns_true_on_nonzero_returncode / test_fix_hint_does_not_claim_ci_will_intercept / test_check_features_file_returns_none_report_when_missing / test_check_design_traceability_passes_when_all_mentioned / test_check_design_traceability_fails_when_missing；102 passed / 0 skipped / 0 xfail
防回归确认：scripts/gates/run.py --trigger=ci --dry-run 退出 0；无其他 plugin 依赖 reviews_consistency，重构未引入跨插件破坏
残留 4 项 minor 全部为 round-2 已显式登记 F-003 / 当前部署不触发的 carry-over（F-r2-07/09/10/11），符合 light review 决策口径『1 minor 残留可允许 approved（标 nice-to-have）』
